hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodations: Hotel Sweet Place in Dhaka offers family rooms with air-conditioning, private bathrooms, and city views. Each room includes a work desk, free toiletries, and a TV.
Dining Experience: Guests can enjoy a terrace, restaurant, and free WiFi. The family-friendly restaurant serves Chinese, Indian, Thai, and local cuisines, including halal and vegan options. Meals are available for brunch, lunch, dinner, and high tea.
Convenient Location: Located 2 km from UITS and 1.8 km from Independent University Bangladesh, the hotel is an 18-minute walk from North South University. Hazrat Shahjalal International Airport is 8 km away.
